step_by_step_thinking:
Tool Call: retrieve("evidence on local anesthesia in shoulder MR arthrography")

Retrieved Documents: 32 documents

You must write at most two sentences. Then state your answer choice clearly using \boxed{letter} format.
After reviewing the retrieved evidence, I find strong consensus supporting the inclusion of local anesthesia in shoulder MR arthrography—not just for procedural pain relief but also as a diagnostic tool to confirm an intra-articular source of pain via test blocking. Multiple sources explicitly describe local anesthetics (like ropivacaine) as integral components of the injectate, serving both analgesic and diagnostic purposes despite minor concerns regarding chondrotoxicity.

Tool Call: retrieve("evidence on local anesthesia in shoulder MR arthrography")

You must write at most two sentences. Then state your answer choice clearly using \boxed{letter} format.
After reviewing the retrieved evidence, I find strong consensus supporting the inclusion of local anesthesia in shoulder MR arthrography—not just for procedural pain relief but also as a diagnostic tool to confirm an intra-articular source of pain via test blocking. Multiple sources explicitly describe local anesthetics (like ropivacaine) as integral components of the injectate, serving both analgesic and diagnostic purposes despite minor concerns regarding chondrotoxicity. \boxed{A}
